languages.text: {name} фон Валанциус, вступивш{mf|ий|ая} в распахнутый вероломным Тразином Неисчислимым портал, обнаружил{mf||а} себя на собственном пустотном корабле — но не на кануне финала {mf|его|ее} славной истории, а в самом ее начале. Впрочем, технологические чары ксеноса не оставили Лорд-капитану и шанса осознать в полной мере всю катастрофу своего положения — вместо этого {name} продолжил{mf||а} играть отведенную {mf|ему|ей} роль в пьесе, заключенной в темпорально-пространственную капсулу и предназначенной лишь для этого зрителя...

{name} von Valancius, after entering the portal opened by the duplicitous Trazyn the Infinite, found {mf|himself|herself} on {mf|his|her} own voidship — but not at the end of {mf|his|her} glorious story, but at its very beginning. However, the xenos's technological sorcery prevented the Lord Captain from realising the full extent of the catastrophe of {mf|his|her} situation — instead, {name} continued to fulfil the role assigned to {mf|him|her}, performing in a play inside a temporal-spatial capsule intended only for an audience of one...

Впрочем, технологические чары ксеноса не оставили Лорд-капитану и шанса осознать в полной мере всю катастрофу своего положения — вместо этого {name} продолжил{mf||а} играть отведенную {mf|ему|ей} роль в пьесе, заключенной в темпорально-пространственную капсулу и предназначенной лишь для этого зрителя...

{name} von Valancius, after entering the portal opened by the duplicitous Trazyn the Infinite, found {mf|himself|herself} on {mf|his|her} own voidship — but not at the end of {mf|his|her} glorious story, but at its very beginning. However, the xenos's technological sorcery prevented the Lord Captain from realising the full extent of the catastrophe of {mf|his|her} situation — instead, {name} continued to fulfil the role assigned to {mf|him|her}, performing in a play inside a temporal-spatial capsule intended only for an audience of one...

languages.text: Tras cruzar el portal que abrió el alevoso Trazyn el Infinito, {name} von Valancius se encontró en su propia nave del vacío; pero no en el epílogo de su glorioso relato, sino al principio del mismo. La brujería tecnológica del xenos impidió que {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán se percatase del verdadero alcance de su aciaga situación; en vez de eso, {name} continuó interpretando el papel que le había sido asignado en una obra teatral escenificada dentro de una cápsula espaciotemporal y para un público formado por un solo individuo...
languages.original_text: {name} von Valancius, after entering the portal opened by the duplicitous Trazyn the Infinite, found {mf|himself|herself} on {mf|his|her} own voidship — but not at the end of {mf|his|her} glorious story, but at its very beginning. However, the xenos's technological sorcery prevented the Lord Captain from realising the full extent of the catastrophe of {mf|his|her} situation — instead, {name} continued to fulfil the role assigned to {mf|him|her}, performing in a play inside a temporal-spatial capsule intended only for an audience of one...

traits.locale_text: Tras cruzar el portal que abrió el alevoso Trazyn el Infinito, {name} von Valancius se encontró en su propia nave del vacío; pero no en el epílogo de su glorioso relato, sino al principio del mismo. La brujería tecnológica del xenos impidió que {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán se percatase del verdadero alcance de su aciaga situación; en vez de eso, {name} continuó interpretando el papel que le había sido asignado en una obra teatral escenificada dentro de una cápsula espaciotemporal y para un público formado por un solo individuo...

languages.text: {name}·冯·瓦兰修斯在踏入那诡计多端的无限者特拉金开启的传送门后，发现回到了自己的虚空舰上。但{mf|他|她}并没有被送到那光辉事迹的终点，而是回到了故事的开端。然而，这个异形的技术巫术蒙蔽了这位舰长大人，使{mf|他|她}无法看清自己身陷何等灾难。相反，{name}继续扮演着为{mf|他|她}安排好的角色，在一个时空胶囊内上演一场戏剧。而观众，只有一个人……
languages.original_text: {name} von Valancius, after entering the portal opened by the duplicitous Trazyn the Infinite, found {mf|himself|herself} on {mf|his|her} own voidship — but not at the end of {mf|his|her} glorious story, but at its very beginning. However, the xenos's technological sorcery prevented the Lord Captain from realising the full extent of the catastrophe of {mf|his|her} situation — instead, {name} continued to fulfil the role assigned to {mf|him|her}, performing in a play inside a temporal-spatial capsule intended only for an audience of one...

traits.locale_text: {name}·冯·瓦兰修斯在踏入那诡计多端的无限者特拉金开启的传送门后，发现回到了自己的虚空舰上。但{mf|他|她}并没有被送到那光辉事迹的终点，而是回到了故事的开端。然而，这个异形的技术巫术蒙蔽了这位舰长大人，使{mf|他|她}无法看清自己身陷何等灾难。相反，{name}继续扮演着为{mf|他|她}安排好的角色，在一个时空胶囊内上演一场戏剧。而观众，只有一个人……

languages.text: Le portail ouvert par le sournois Trazyn renvoya {name} von Valancius à bord de son propre vaisseau. Cependant, loin de clore ce chapitre de sa glorieuse histoire, {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} se retrouva à son commencement. Sous l'emprise de la sorcellerie technologique du xénos, {mf|il|elle} n'avait pas conscience de sa situation catastrophique et continua ainsi à jouer le rôle qui lui avait été attribué dans cette capsule spatiotemporelle pour divertir un unique spectateur...
languages.original_text: {name} von Valancius, after entering the portal opened by the duplicitous Trazyn the Infinite, found {mf|himself|herself} on {mf|his|her} own voidship — but not at the end of {mf|his|her} glorious story, but at its very beginning. However, the xenos's technological sorcery prevented the Lord Captain from realising the full extent of the catastrophe of {mf|his|her} situation — instead, {name} continued to fulfil the role assigned to {mf|him|her}, performing in a play inside a temporal-spatial capsule intended only for an audience of one...

Cependant, loin de clore ce chapitre de sa glorieuse histoire, {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} se retrouva à son commencement. Sous l'emprise de la sorcellerie technologique du xénos, {mf|il|elle} n'avait pas conscience de sa situation catastrophique et continua ainsi à jouer le rôle qui lui avait été attribué dans cette capsule spatiotemporelle pour divertir un unique spectateur...

languages.text: İkiyüzlü Mutlak Trazyn'in açtığı geçide giren {name} von Valancius, kendini kendi uçsuz gemisinde buldu. Ancak şanlı hikâyesinin sonunda değil, en başındaydı. Zenonun teknolojik sahirliği, Lord Kaptan'ın içinde bulunduğu durumun felaketinin tam boyutunu idrak etmesini engelledi. Bunun yerine {name}, sadece tek kişilik bir seyirci için tasarlanmış, uzay zaman kapsülünde gerçekleşen bir tiyatro oyununda performans sergileyerek kendisine verilen rolü yerine getirmeye devam etti...
languages.original_text: {name} von Valancius, after entering the portal opened by the duplicitous Trazyn the Infinite, found {mf|himself|herself} on {mf|his|her} own voidship — but not at the end of {mf|his|her} glorious story, but at its very beginning. However, the xenos's technological sorcery prevented the Lord Captain from realising the full extent of the catastrophe of {mf|his|her} situation — instead, {name} continued to fulfil the role assigned to {mf|him|her}, performing in a play inside a temporal-spatial capsule intended only for an audience of one...

traits.locale_text: İkiyüzlü Mutlak Trazyn'in açtığı geçide giren {name} von Valancius, kendini kendi uçsuz gemisinde buldu. Ancak şanlı hikâyesinin sonunda değil, en başındaydı. Zenonun teknolojik sahirliği, Lord Kaptan'ın içinde bulunduğu durumun felaketinin tam boyutunu idrak etmesini engelledi. Bunun yerine {name}, sadece tek kişilik bir seyirci için tasarlanmış, uzay zaman kapsülünde gerçekleşen bir tiyatro oyununda performans sergileyerek kendisine verilen rolü yerine getirmeye devam etti...

languages.text: Nachdem {name} von Valancius, das Portal betreten hatte, das Trazyn der Unendliche in seiner Doppelzüngigkeit geöffnet hatte, fand {mf|er|sie} sich auf {mf|seinem|ihrem} eigenen Raumschiff wieder — allerdings nicht am Ende {mf|seiner|ihrer} ruhmreichen Geschichte, sondern an deren Anfang. Allerdings verhinderte das technologische Hexenwerk des Xenos, dass der Lord Captain das ganze Ausmaß der Katastrophe hinsichtlich {mf|seiner|ihrer} Situation erkannte — stattdessen spielte {name} weiter die Rolle, die {mf|ihm|ihr} auferlegt war ... in einem Schauspiel im Inneren einer raumzeitlichen Kapsel vor einem einzigen Zuschauer ...
languages.original_text: {name} von Valancius, after entering the portal opened by the duplicitous Trazyn the Infinite, found {mf|himself|herself} on {mf|his|her} own voidship — but not at the end of {mf|his|her} glorious story, but at its very beginning. However, the xenos's technological sorcery prevented the Lord Captain from realising the full extent of the catastrophe of {mf|his|her} situation — instead, {name} continued to fulfil the role assigned to {mf|him|her}, performing in a play inside a temporal-spatial capsule intended only for an audience of one...

traits.locale_text: Nachdem {name} von Valancius, das Portal betreten hatte, das Trazyn der Unendliche in seiner Doppelzüngigkeit geöffnet hatte, fand {mf|er|sie} sich auf {mf|seinem|ihrem} eigenen Raumschiff wieder — allerdings nicht am Ende {mf|seiner|ihrer} ruhmreichen Geschichte, sondern an deren Anfang. Allerdings verhinderte das technologische Hexenwerk des Xenos, dass der Lord Captain das ganze Ausmaß der Katastrophe hinsichtlich {mf|seiner|ihrer} Situation erkannte — stattdessen spielte {name} weiter die Rolle, die {mf|ihm|ihr} auferlegt war ... in einem Schauspiel im Inneren einer raumzeitlichen Kapsel vor einem einzigen Zuschauer ...

languages.text: ヴァランシウス家の{name}は、裏切り者のトラズン・ザ・インフィニットが作ったポータルを通過し、自らの空母にたどり着いた。しかし、それは栄光に満ちた物語の終わりではなく、その始まりだった。異星人の技術魔法により、この状況の真の惨状を理解することはできなかった。{name}は、一人だけの観客のために作られた時空カプセルの中で、演劇の役目を果たし続けた。
languages.original_text: {name} von Valancius, after entering the portal opened by the duplicitous Trazyn the Infinite, found {mf|himself|herself} on {mf|his|her} own voidship — but not at the end of {mf|his|her} glorious story, but at its very beginning. However, the xenos's technological sorcery prevented the Lord Captain from realising the full extent of the catastrophe of {mf|his|her} situation — instead, {name} continued to fulfil the role assigned to {mf|him|her}, performing in a play inside a temporal-spatial capsule intended only for an audience of one...

traits.locale_text: ヴァランシウス家の{name}は、裏切り者のトラズン・ザ・インフィニットが作ったポータルを通過し、自らの空母にたどり着いた。しかし、それは栄光に満ちた物語の終わりではなく、その始まりだった。異星人の技術魔法により、この状況の真の惨状を理解することはできなかった。{name}は、一人だけの観客のために作られた時空カプセルの中で、演劇の役目を果たし続けた。
